title: Find Me Some Bulk Cheap Dark Choc/Cocoa Powder?
body:
Where Y'all getting deals/discounts on decent cocoa powder or dark chocolate?
We regularly do from-scratch choc treats but the prices of cocoa powder or choc with more rhan 50% cocoa just keep going up, making the greens packet mixes more enticing but regrettable :S
Ive been reading that prices should've stabilised, but nope.
Any ideas/finds?
My dead ends:
- Colesworth homebrands @$20/kg (e.g. $7.50 for a 375g bag of cocoa powder) have been OOS since earlier this year.
- Costco bulk cocoa has been OOS since 2025 early.
- Online sources are bad, e.g. amazon
- IGA/foodworks black and gold cocoa is approx $6.50 for their 255g box ($25/kg), occasional tiny cashback offers :S, up 25% 3 months ago
- post-easter specials were less than ideal this year…
-the organic co-ops are always aroujd $45/kg
Anyone got any good bulk sources?
